# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('nsgNamePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "Allow-RDP"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow RDP access from any source"
        - name: "Allow-SSH"
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow SSH access from any source"
        - name: "Allow-HTTP"
          properties:
            priority: 120
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow HTTP access from any source"
        - name: "Allow-HTTPS"
          properties:
            priority: 130
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            description: "Allow HTTPS access from any source" 

parameters:
  nsgNamePrefix:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Prefix for the Network Security Group name"
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Location for the Network Security Group"
